iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Hour 15 update: Hegseth says US 'controls fate of Iran', implies more IRGC/Basij leaders will be targeted. Brent at $118, some benchmarks $120+. Vessel ablaze off UAE coast, another damaged off Qatar. Bushehr nuclear plant struck but no damage per IAEA. US using 5,000-lb bunker busters on underground weapon sites. Deeper strikes into Iranian territory. Iran retaliating with multi-wave attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure. Updated 2026-03-19T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: US 'controls the fate of Iran', more IRGC/Basij leaders targeted
latest_news.text: Hegseth says US military 'controls the fate of Iran'. Implies more IRGC/Basij senior leaders will be killed: 'The last job anyone in the world wants right now, senior leader for the IRGC or Basij.'

latest_news.headline: Iran strikes set vessel ablaze off UAE coast, another damaged off Qatar
latest_news.text: A vessel was set ablaze off the UAE coast and another damaged off Qatar, underscoring danger to shipping in the region as Hormuz remains effectively closed.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude spikes to $118, European gas prices doubled in past month
latest_news.text: Brent crude hit $118/barrel (up 60% since war began). European natural gas benchmark doubled in past month. Energy crisis deepening globally.

latest_news.headline: US drops 5,000-lb bunker busters on underground Iranian weapon facilities
latest_news.text: Gen. Dan Caine confirms US forces using 5,000-lb bunker buster bombs on underground weapon-storage facilities. Warplanes hunting Iranian boats in Hormuz, helicopters striking Iranian drones.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Hour 15 update: Death toll now 968+ (up from 912). 1M+ displaced. Central Beirut strikes continuing - buildings destroyed, residents fleeing. Litani River bridges destroyed cutting south-north links. Ground operations expanding. No ceasefire signals. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes. Updated 2026-03-19T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 14 update: No new Turkey-specific developments. NATO Patriot deployment at Incirlik remains key hub. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey (Mar 4, 9, 13). Coupling from Iran conventional keeps Turkey at deterrent. Updated 2026-03-19T14:04:00Z Hour 15: No new developments. Updated 2026-03-19T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 44% (stable). Hour 15 update: Eid ceasefire (5-day, Mar 18-23) confirmed holding. TTP separate 3-day ceasefire also active. Qatar welcomes truce as 'positive gesture'. Fighting expected to resume post-Eid with 'renewed intensity'. Updated 2026-03-19T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: Hegseth: US 'controls the fate of Iran', more IRGC/Basij leaders to be targeted
Bessent: Kharg Island (90% Iran oil) 'could become American asset'
Brent crude at $118, some benchmarks crossed $120 — European gas doubled in month
Iran strikes set vessel ablaze off UAE, another damaged off Qatar
Qatar Ras Laffan LNG suffers 'extensive damage' from Iranian missiles
Saudi Aramco SAMREF refinery targeted in Iranian aerial attack
Two Kuwaiti oil refineries ablaze from Iranian strikes

US dropping 5,000-lb bunker busters on underground Iranian weapon sites

new: iran_conventional: oil_above_120 confirmed — Brent at $118, some benchmarks $120+
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holding through Eid Mar 23 — temporary de-escalation. Iran war continues at maximum tempo. Hegseth threatens more IRGC/Basij assassinations. Brent at $118 approaching $120 official threshold. Energy infrastructure targeting cycle deepening across all Gulf states. Vessels burning off UAE/Qatar. No ceasefire signals in Iran or Lebanon theaters. Watch: if ceasefire extends beyond Eid in Pakistan, downgrade that tracker.

latest_news.headline: Saudi FM warns Iran patience 'not unlimited' — military response implied
latest_news.text: Saudi Foreign Minister warns Iran that Gulf states' patience is 'not unlimited' and they have 'significant capabilities' to respond. First explicit military response language from Riyadh.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes hit Tehran oil depot and refinery — capital targeted
latest_news.text: Smoke covers parts of Tehran after Israeli strikes hit oil depot and refinery in/near capital. Geographic expansion of Israeli targeting to Iran's capital city infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Trump distances US from Israeli strikes on key Iranian gasfield
latest_news.text: Questions raised over US knowledge of Israeli plans to attack South Pars gasfield. Trump admin attempting to distance from Israeli targeting decisions on energy infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: US weighs sending thousands more troops to Middle East
latest_news.text: US weighs deploying thousands of additional troops to the region. Would further entrench US in the conflict but provides Trump with more military options.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon identifies 7th US service member killed in Iran war
latest_news.text: 7th US service member confirmed killed in Iran war operations. Cumulative US casualties mounting after 20 days of conflict.

latest_news.headline: Pakistani Taliban announces 3-day ceasefire — separate from state Eid truce
latest_news.text: Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) announces separate 3-day ceasefire ahead of Eid, hours after Pakistan-Afghanistan state-level Eid pause declared.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 15:04 UTC) — (1) Hegseth threatens more IRGC/Basij assassinations, says US 'controls Iran's fate'; (2) Brent at $118, gas doubled — global energy crisis deepening; (3) Vessels burning off UAE/Qatar coasts; (4) Israel-Lebanon: 968+ killed, Litani bridges destroyed, 1M+ displaced; (5) Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holding through Eid (Mar 23); (6) Iran retaliating with multi-wave strikes on Gulf energy infrastructure across Saudi, Qatar, UAE, Kuwait; (7) No ceasefire signals in Iran or Lebanon theaters.
